contentBlocks.original:
श्रीविष्णोः शतनामस्तोत्रम्
श्री गणेशाय नमः ।
नारद उवाच ।
ॐ वासुदेवं हृषीकेशं वामनं जलशायिनम् ।
जनार्दनं हरि कृष्णं श्रीवक्षं गरुडध्वजम् ॥ १॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrīviṣṇoḥ śatanāmastotram
śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ .
nārada uvāca .
oṃ vāsudevaṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ vāmanaṃ jalaśāyinam .
janārdanaṃ hari kṛṣṇaṃ śrīvakṣaṃ garuḍadhvajam .. 1..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to Lord Ganesha. Narada speaks: Om, I worship Vāsudeva, Hṛṣīkeśa, Vāmana, the one who lies on water, Janārdana, Hari, Kṛṣṇa, and the one with a beautiful chest, Garuḍadhvaja.
contentBlocks.meanings: श्रीविष्णोः (śrīviṣṇoḥ) – of Lord Vishnu (śrī:glorious | viṣṇoḥ:of Vishnu); शतनामस्तोत्रम् (śatanāmastotram) – hymn of hundred names (śata:hundred | nāma:names | stotram:hymn); श्री (śrī) – auspicious; गणेशाय (gaṇeśāya) – to Ganesha; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; नारद (nārada) – Narada; उवाच (uvāca) – spoke; ॐ (oṃ) – Om; वासुदेवं (vāsudevam) – Vasudeva; हृषीकेशं (hṛṣīkeśam) – Hrishikesha; वामनं (vāmanaṃ) – Vamana; जलशायिनम् (jalaśāyinam) – one who lies on water (jala:water | śāyinam:one who lies); जनार्दनं (janārdanam) – Janardana; हरि (hari) – Hari; कृष्णं (kṛṣṇaṃ) – Krishna; श्रीवक्षं (śrīvakṣam) – beautiful chest (śrī:beautiful | vakṣam:chest); गरुडध्वजम् (garuḍadhvajam) – Garuḍa-bannered (garuḍa:Garuḍa | dhvajam:bannered);

contentBlocks.original:
वाराहं पुण्डरीकाक्षं नृसिंहं नरकान्तकम् ।
अव्यक्तं शाश्वतं विष्णुमनन्तमजमव्ययम् ॥ २॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vārāhaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣaṃ nṛsiṃhaṃ narakāntakam .
avyaktaṃ śāśvataṃ viṣṇumanantamajamavyayam .. 2..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Vārāha, Pundarīkākṣa, Nṛsiṃha, the destroyer of hell, the unmanifest, the eternal Vishnu, the infinite, the unborn, and the imperishable.
contentBlocks.meanings: वाराहं (vārāham) – Vārāha; पुण्डरीकाक्षं (puṇḍarīkākṣam) – lotus-eyed (puṇḍarīka:lotus | akṣa:eye); नृसिंहं (nṛsiṃham) – Nṛsiṃha; नरकान्तकम् (narakāntakam) – destroyer of hell (nara:hell | kāntaka:destroyer); अव्यक्तं (avyaktam) – unmanifest; शाश्वतं (śāśvatam) – eternal; विष्णुम् (viṣṇum) – Vishnu; अनन्तम् (anantam) – infinite; अजम् (ajam) – unborn; अव्ययम् (avyayam) – imperishable;

contentBlocks.original:
नारायणं गदाध्यक्षं गोविन्दं कीर्तिभाजनम् ।
गोवर्धनोद्धरं देवं भूधरं भुवनेश्वरम् ॥ ३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nārāyaṇaṃ gadādhyakṣaṃ govindaṃ kīrtibhājanam .
govardhanoddharaṃ devaṃ bhūdharaṃ bhuvaneśvaram .. 3..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Nārāyaṇa, the wielder of the mace, Govinda, the one who is the recipient of fame, the deity who lifted Govardhana, the Lord of the Earth, and the Lord of all beings.
contentBlocks.meanings: नारायणं (nārāyaṇam) – Nārāyaṇa; गदाध्यक्षं (gadādhyakṣam) – wielder of the mace (gada:mace | adhyakṣam:wielder); गोविन्दं (govindam) – Govinda; कीर्तिभाजनम् (kīrtibhājanam) – recipient of fame (kīrti:fame | bhājanam:recipient); गोवर्धनोद्धरं (govardhanoddharam) – who lifted Govardhana (govardhana:Govardhana | uddharam:who lifted); देवं (devam) – deity; भूधरं (bhūdharam) – Lord of the Earth (bhū:earth | dharam:holder); भुवनेश्वरम् (bhuvaneśvaram) – Lord of all beings (bhuvana:beings | īśvaram:Lord);

contentBlocks.original:
वेत्तारं यज्ञपुरुषं यज्ञेशं यज्ञवाहकम् ।
चक्रपाणिं गदापाणिं शङ्खपाणिं नरोत्तमम् ॥ ४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vettāraṃ yajñapuruṣaṃ yajñeśaṃ yajñavāhakam .
cakrapāṇiṃ gadāpāṇiṃ śaṅkhapāṇiṃ narottamam .. 4..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship the one who is the knower of sacrifices, the supreme being of sacrifices, the one who carries the sacrificial implements, the wielder of the discus, the wielder of the mace, and the one who holds the conch, the best among men.
contentBlocks.meanings: वेत्तारं (vettāram) – knower; यज्ञपुरुषं (yajñapuruṣam) – supreme being of sacrifices (yajña:sacrifice | puruṣa:being); यज्ञेशं (yajñeśam) – lord of sacrifices (yajña:sacrifice | īśa:lord); यज्ञवाहकम् (yajñavāhakam) – carrier of sacrifices (yajña:sacrifice | vāhaka:carrier); चक्रपाणिं (cakrapāṇim) – wielder of the discus (cakra:discus | pāṇi:hand); गदापाणिं (gadāpāṇim) – wielder of the mace (gadā:mace | pāṇi:hand); शङ्खपाणिं (śaṅkhapāṇim) – holder of the conch (śaṅkha:conch | pāṇi:hand); नरोत्तमम् (narottamam) – best among men (nara:man | uttama:best);

contentBlocks.original:
वैकुण्ठं दुष्टदमनं भूगर्भं पीतवाससम् ।
त्रिविक्रमं त्रिकालज्ञं त्रिमूर्तिं नन्दिकेश्वरम् ॥ ५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vaikuṇṭhaṃ duṣṭadamanaṃ bhūgarbhaṃ pītavāsasam .
trivikramaṃ trikālajñaṃ trimūrtiṃ nandikeśvaram .. 5..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Vaikuṇṭha, the one who destroys the wicked, the one who is the essence of the Earth, the one dressed in yellow garments, Trivikrama, the knower of past, present, and future, the Trinity, and Nandikeśvara.
contentBlocks.meanings: वैकुण्ठं (vaikuṇṭham) – Vaikuṇṭha; दुष्टदमनं (duṣṭadamanaṃ) – destroyer of the wicked (duṣṭa:wicked | damanaṃ:destroyer); भूगर्भं (bhūgarbhaṃ) – essence of the Earth (bhū:Earth | garbhaṃ:essence); पीतवाससम् (pītavāsasam) – dressed in yellow garments (pīta:yellow | vāsasam:garments); त्रिविक्रमं (trivikramaṃ) – Trivikrama; त्रिकालज्ञं (trikālajñaṃ) – knower of past, present, future (tri:three | kāla:time | jñaṃ:knower); त्रिमूर्तिं (trimūrtiṃ) – the Trinity (tri:three | mūrtiṃ:forms); नन्दिकेश्वरम् (nandikeśvaram) – Nandikeśvara;

contentBlocks.original:
रामं रामं हयग्रीवं भीमं रौद्रं भवोद्भवम् ।
श्रीपतिं श्रीधरं श्रीशं मङ्गलं मङ्गलायुधम् ॥ ६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
rāmaṃ rāmaṃ hayagrīvaṃ bhīmaṃ raudraṃ bhavodbhavam .
śrīpatiṃ śrīdharaṃ śrīśaṃ maṅgalaṃ maṅgalāyudham .. 6..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Rāma, Rāma, Hayagrīva, Bhīma, the fierce one, the one who emerges from the ocean of existence, the Lord of wealth, the bearer of prosperity, the auspicious one, and the one who wields auspicious weapons.
contentBlocks.meanings: रामं (rāmaṃ) – Rāma; रामं (rāmaṃ) – Rāma; हयग्रीवं (hayagrīvaṃ) – Hayagrīva; भीमं (bhīmaṃ) – Bhīma; रौद्रं (raudraṃ) – fierce; भवोद्भवम् (bhavodbhavam) – emerges from existence (bhava:existence | udbhavam:emerges); श्रीपतिं (śrīpatiṃ) – Lord of wealth (śrī:wealth | patiṃ:Lord); श्रीधरं (śrīdharaṃ) – bearer of prosperity (śrī:prosperity | dharaṃ:bearer); श्रीशं (śrīśaṃ) – auspicious one (śrī:auspicious | śaṃ:one); मङ्गलं (maṅgalaṃ) – auspicious; मङ्गलायुधम् (maṅgalāyudham) – wields auspicious weapons (maṅgala:auspicious | āyudham:weapons);

contentBlocks.original:
दामोदरं दमोपेतं केशवं केशिसूदनम् ।
वरेण्यं वरदं विष्णुमानन्दं वसुदेवजम् ॥ ७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dāmodaraṃ damopetaṃ keśavaṃ keśisūdanam .
vareṇyaṃ varadaṃ viṣṇumānandaṃ vasudevajam .. 7..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Dāmodara, the one bound by love, the one with beautiful hair, the slayer of the Kesi demon, the one who is most excellent, the granter of boons, the Vishnu who brings bliss, and the son of Vasudeva.
contentBlocks.meanings: दामोदरं (dāmodaraṃ) – Dāmodara; दमोपेतं (damopetaṃ) – bound by love (dama:love | upetaṃ:bound by); केशवं (keśavaṃ) – Keśava; केशिसूदनम् (keśisūdanam) – slayer of the Kesi demon (keśi:Kesi demon | sūdanam:slayer); वरेण्यं (vareṇyaṃ) – most excellent; वरदं (varadaṃ) – granter of boons (vara:boon | daṃ:granter); विष्णुम् (viṣṇum) – Vishnu; आनन्दं (ānandaṃ) – bliss; वसुदेवजम् (vasudevajam) – son of Vasudeva (vasudeva:Vasudeva | jam:son of);

contentBlocks.original:
हिरण्यरेतसं दीप्तं पुराणं पुरुषोत्तमम् ।
सकलं निष्कलं शुद्धं निर्गुणं गुणशाश्वतम् ॥ ८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
hiraṇyaretasaṃ dīptaṃ purāṇaṃ puruṣottamam .
sakalaṃ niṣkalaṃ śuddhaṃ nirguṇaṃ guṇaśāśvatam .. 8..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Hiraṇyaretas, the resplendent one, the ancient, the supreme person, the all-encompassing, the formless, the pure, the attribute-less, and the one who possesses eternal qualities.
contentBlocks.meanings: हिरण्यरेतसम् (hiraṇyaretasam) – Hiraṇyaretas (hiraṇya:golden | retas:seed); दीप्तम् (dīptam) – resplendent; पुराणम् (purāṇam) – ancient; पुरुषोत्तमम् (puruṣottamam) – supreme person (puruṣa:person | uttama:supreme); सकलम् (sakalam) – all-encompassing; निष्कलम् (niṣkalam) – formless; शुद्धम् (śuddham) – pure; निर्गुणम् (nirguṇam) – attribute-less; गुणशाश्वतम् (guṇaśāśvatam) – eternal qualities (guṇa:qualities | śāśvata:eternal);

contentBlocks.original:
हिरण्यतनुसङ्काशं सूर्यायुतसमप्रभम् ।
मेघश्यामं चतुर्बाहुं कुशलं कमलेक्षणम् ॥ ९॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
hiraṇyatanusaṅkāśaṃ sūryāyutasamaprabham .
meghaśyāmaṃ caturbāhuṃ kuśalaṃ kamalekṣaṇam .. 9..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship Hiraṇyatanū, the one resembling gold, with a radiance equal to that of thousands of suns, of dark-blue complexion, with four arms, skilled, and with lotus-like eyes.
contentBlocks.meanings: हिरण्यतनुसङ्काशं (hiraṇyatanusaṅkāśam) – resembling gold (hiraṇya:gold | tanu:body | saṅkāśam:resembling); सूर्यायुतसमप्रभम् (sūryāyutasamaprabham) – radiance of thousand suns (sūrya:sun | ayuta:thousand | sama:equal | prabham:radiance); मेघश्यामं (meghaśyāmam) – dark-blue complexion (megha:cloud | śyāmam:dark-blue); चतुर्बाहुं (caturbāhum) – four arms (catur:four | bāhum:arms); कुशलं (kuśalam) – skilled; कमलेक्षणम् (kamalekṣaṇam) – lotus-like eyes (kamala:lotus | īkṣaṇam:eyes);

contentBlocks.original:
ज्योतीरूपमरूपं च स्वरूपं रूपसंस्थितम् ।
सर्वज्ञं सर्वरूपस्थं सर्वेशं सर्वतोमुखम् ॥ १०॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jyotīrūpamarūpaṃ ca svarūpaṃ rūpasaṃsthitam .
sarvajñaṃ sarvarūpasthaṃ sarveśaṃ sarvatomukham .. 10..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship the one who is the form of light, the formless, the one whose essence is established in forms, the all-knowing, the one who exists in all forms, the Lord of all, and the one with faces in all directions.
contentBlocks.meanings: ज्योतीरूपम् (jyotīrūpam) – form of light (jyoti:light | rūpam:form); अरूपं (arūpam) – formless; च (ca) – and; स्वरूपं (svarūpam) – own form (sva:own | rūpam:form); रूपसंस्थितम् (rūpasaṃsthitam) – essence in forms (rūpa:form | saṃsthitam:established); सर्वज्ञं (sarvajñam) – all-knowing (sarva:all | jñam:knowing); सर्वरूपस्थं (sarvarūpastham) – exists in all forms (sarva:all | rūpastham:exists in forms); सर्वेशं (sarveśam) – Lord of all (sarva:all | īśam:Lord); सर्वतोमुखम् (sarvatomukham) – faces in all directions (sarvataḥ:in all directions | mukham:faces);

contentBlocks.original:
ज्ञानं कूटस्थमचलं ज्ञानदं परमं प्रभुम् ।
योगीशं योगनिष्णातं योगिनं योगरूपिणम् ॥ ११॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jñānaṃ kūṭasthamacalaṃ jñānadaṃ paramaṃ prabhum .
yogīśaṃ yoganiṣṇātaṃ yoginaṃ yogarūpiṇam .. 11..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship the knowledge that is stable and unchanging, the giver of wisdom, the supreme Lord, the master of yogis, the one accomplished in yoga, and the embodiment of yoga for all yogis.
contentBlocks.meanings: ज्ञानं (jñānam) – knowledge; कूटस्थम् (kūṭastham) – stable and unchanging; अचलम् (acalam) – immovable; ज्ञानदं (jñānadaṃ) – giver of wisdom; परमं (paramam) – supreme; प्रभुम् (prabhum) – lord; योगीशं (yogīśam) – master of yogis (yogi:yogi | īśa:master); योगनिष्णातं (yoganiṣṇātam) – accomplished in yoga (yoga:yoga | niṣṇāta:accomplished); योगिनं (yoginam) – yogi; योगरूपिणम् (yogarūpiṇam) – embodiment of yoga (yoga:yoga | rūpiṇa:embodiment);

contentBlocks.original:
ईश्वरं सर्वभूतानां वन्दे भूतमयं प्रभुम् ।
इति नामशतं दिव्यं वैष्णवं खलु पापहम् ॥ १२॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
īśvaraṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ vande bhūtamayaṃ prabhum .
iti nāmaśataṃ divyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ khalu pāpaham .. 12..
contentBlocks.translation: I worship the Lord of all beings, the master of all creation. This divine hundred names is indeed a powerful remedy for sins.
contentBlocks.meanings: ईश्वरं (īśvaram) – the Lord; सर्वभूतानां (sarvabhūtānāṃ) – of all beings (sarva:all | bhūtānāṃ:of beings); वन्दे (vande) – I worship; भूतमयं (bhūtamayaṃ) – master of all creation (bhūta:creation | mayaṃ:consisting of); प्रभुम् (prabhum) – the master; इति (iti) – thus; नामशतं (nāmaśataṃ) – hundred names (nāma:name | śataṃ:hundred); दिव्यं (divyaṃ) – divine; वैष्णवं (vaiṣṇavaṃ) – related to Vishnu; खलु (khalu) – indeed; पापहम् (pāpaham) – remedy for sins (pāpa:sins | ham:destroyer);

contentBlocks.original:
व्यासेन कथितं पूर्वं सर्वपापप्रणाशनम् ।
यः पठेत्प्रातरुत्थाय स भवेद्वैष्णवो नरः ॥ १३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vyāsena kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam .
yaḥ paṭhetprātarutthāya sa bhavedvaiṣṇavo naraḥ .. 13..
contentBlocks.translation: This was narrated by Vyasa in ancient times, as the destroyer of all sins. Whoever recites it upon rising in the morning will indeed become a devotee of Vishnu.
contentBlocks.meanings: व्यासेन (vyāsena) – by Vyasa; कथितं (kathitaṃ) – narrated; पूर्वं (pūrvaṃ) – in ancient times; सर्वपापप्रणाशनम् (sarvapāpapraṇāśanam) – destroyer of all sins (sarva:all | pāpa:sins | praṇāśanam:destroyer); यः (yaḥ) – whoever; पठेत् (paṭhet) – recites; प्रातरुत्थाय (prātarutthāya) – upon rising in the morning (prātaḥ:morning | utthāya:rising); स (sa) – he; भवेत् (bhavet) – will become; वैष्णवः (vaiṣṇavaḥ) – devotee of Vishnu; नरः (naraḥ) – man;

contentBlocks.translation: A soul purified from all sins will attain union with Vishnu. One who performs thousands of Chandrayana sacrifices and gives away hundreds of daughters is not as great as he.
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वपापविशुद्धात्मा (sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā) – soul purified from all sins (sarva:all | pāpa:sins | viśuddha:purified | ātmā:soul); विष्णुसायुज्यम् (viṣṇusāyujyam) – union with Vishnu (viṣṇu:Vishnu | sāyujyam:union); आप्नुयात् (āpnuyāt) – will attain; चान्द्रायणसहस्राणि (cāndrāyaṇasahasrāṇi) – thousands of Chandrayana sacrifices (cāndrāyaṇa:Chandrayana sacrifice | sahasrāṇi:thousands); कन्यादानशतानि (kanyādānaśatāni) – hundreds of daughters given (kanyā:daughters | dāna:giving | śatāni:hundreds); च (ca) – and;

contentBlocks.original:
गवां लक्षसहस्राणि मुक्तिभागी भवेन्नरः ।
अश्वमेधायुतं पुण्यं फलं प्राप्नोति मानवः ॥ १५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gavāṃ lakṣasahasrāṇi muktibhāgī bhavennaraḥ .
aśvamedhāyutaṃ puṇyaṃ phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ .. 15..
contentBlocks.translation: A person who recites this will attain the merit of giving away a hundred thousand cows and will share in the benefits of performing ten thousand Ashvamedha sacrifices.
contentBlocks.meanings: गवां (gavāṃ) – of cows; लक्षसहस्राणि (lakṣasahasrāṇi) – hundred thousand (lakṣa:hundred thousand | sahasrāṇi:thousands); मुक्तिभागी (muktibhāgī) – attainer of liberation (mukti:liberation | bhāgī:attainer); भवेत् (bhavet) – will become; नरः (naraḥ) – man; अश्वमेधायुतं (aśvamedhāyutaṃ) – ten thousand Ashvamedha (aśvamedha:Ashvamedha sacrifice | ayutaṃ:ten thousand); पुण्यं (puṇyaṃ) – merit; फलं (phalaṃ) – fruit; प्राप्नोति (prāpnoti) – attains; मानवः (mānavaḥ) – human;

contentBlocks.translation: Thus ends the Vishnu Shatanama Stotra as narrated in the Vishnu Purana.
contentBlocks.meanings: इति (iti) – thus; श्रीविष्णुपुराणे (śrīviṣṇupurāṇe) – in the glorious Vishnu Purana (śrī:glorious | viṣṇu:Vishnu | purāṇe:in the Purana); विष्णुशतनामस्तोत्रं (viṣṇuśatanāmastotraṃ) – Vishnu's hundred names hymn (viṣṇu:Vishnu | śata:hundred | nāma:names | stotraṃ:hymn); सम्पूर्णम् (sampūrṇam) – complete;
